Title: createWishlist — Happy Path
Preconditions: User authenticated with valid token; store configured; GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; userId obtained via me{id}; cultureName={{CULTURE_NAME}}; currencyCode={{CURRENCY_CODE}}; user_email={{USER_EMAIL}}; user_password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{USER_EMAIL}}&password={{USER_PASSWORD}}&storeId={{STORE_ID}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab in bottom panel) → set Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN> in Headers editor via execCommand('insertText') → screenshot to verify token visible
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[SETUP] Type query: query { me { id } } → [GQL] Execute → [VAR] save <USER_ID> from data.me.id
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createWishlist(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" listName: "AGENT-TEST-WL-001" cultureName: "{{CULTURE_NAME}}" currencyCode: "{{CURRENCY_CODE}}" }) { id name itemsCount } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — save <LIST_ID> from data.createWishlist.id
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] is empty
[DATA] data.createWishlist.id is non-empty string (UUID format)
[DATA] data.createWishlist.name = "AGENT-TEST-WL-001"
[DATA] data.createWishlist.itemsCount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type query { wishlist(listId: "<LIST_ID>") { id name itemsCount } } → execute → confirms list exists with correct name
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response; data.createWishlist null; id empty; name mismatch; GraphiQL shows auth error
Cleanup: Execute mutation removeWishlist(command: { listId: "<LIST_ID>" }) to delete created wishlist

Title: cloneWishlist — Verify All Items Copied
Preconditions: Source wishlist with at least 1 item exists; product {{TEST_SKU}} in catalog; user authenticated; GraphiQL accessible

[SETUP] Query me { id } → save <USER_ID>
[SETUP] createWishlist(storeId, userId, listName: "AGENT-TEST-WL-004-SRC") → save <SRC_LIST_ID>
[SETUP] addWishlistItem(command: { listId: "<SRC_LIST_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 }) → verify itemsCount = 1
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { cloneWishlist(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" listId: "<SRC_LIST_ID>" listName: "AGENT-TEST-WL-004-CLONE" cultureName: "{{CULTURE_NAME}}" currencyCode: "{{CURRENCY_CODE}}" }) { id name itemsCount items { productId quantity } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — save <CLONE_LIST_ID>; note itemsCount
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] is empty
[DATA] data.cloneWishlist.id is non-empty string (different from <SRC_LIST_ID>)
[DATA] data.cloneWishlist.name = "AGENT-TEST-WL-004-CLONE"
[DATA] data.cloneWishlist.itemsCount = 1
[DATA] data.cloneWishlist.items[0].productId = "{{TEST_SKU}}"
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Query wishlist(listId: "<CLONE_LIST_ID>") { id name itemsCount items { productId } } → itemsCount = 1 and productId matches
[ROUNDTRIP] Query wishlist(listId: "<SRC_LIST_ID>") { itemsCount } → source unchanged (itemsCount still = 1)
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; itemsCount mismatch; items[] empty in clone; source list destroyed; id collision
Cleanup: Execute removeWishlist for <CLONE_LIST_ID> then removeWishlist for <SRC_LIST_ID>

Title: wishlists Query — List with Pagination
Preconditions: At least 1 wishlist exists for the user; user authenticated; GraphiQL accessible
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; userId from me{id}; first=5; after=null
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token → save bearer token; set in GraphiQL Headers
[SETUP] Query me { id } → save <USER_ID>
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { wishlists(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" first: 5) { totalCount items { id name itemsCount } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — note totalCount and items count
[ACT] If pageInfo.hasNextPage = true: clear editor → type same query with after: "<endCursor>" → execute → verify next page returns different items
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] is empty
[DATA] data.wishlists.totalCount >= 1
[DATA] data.wishlists.items is an array (length <= 5 per page)
[DATA] Each item has id (non-empty string) and name (non-empty string)
[COUNT] items.length <= first (5)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; totalCount = 0 when lists exist; items array null; pagination cursor invalid; second page returns same items as first
